input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.7.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.7.2
            TITLE: cockpit template criteria

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.7.2: Cockpit Template Criteria
IN.7.2 Cockpit Template Criteria 
To pass Mechanical Technical Inspection, both Cockpit Templates must fit as described.

final_answer: To pass Mechanical Technical Inspection, both Cockpit Templates must fit as described.
